items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Edge Closer to Wider War After U.S. Service Members Killed
items.summary: The U.S. military said it had targeted Iranian forces that were responsible for an attack on a base in Jordan that left two American service members dead and one missing.
